response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, along with entrepreneurial initiatives like GISCollective. While his background is technically robust, his leadership and strategic AI expertise are less emphasized compared to the Director-level Principal Engineer role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience (18+ years) across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Hands-on AI and cloud contributions (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Entrepreneurial mindset with open-source projects (GISCollective) and startup-like roles
concerns: Lacks explicit Director-level leadership experience or strategic AI product ownership
No advanced degree in AI/ML (Bachelor’s in CS and Photography only)
Cloud/AI expertise is builder-focused but not clearly recognized as industry-leading
